title: Segment Section: Midpoint Formula
learningOutcomes: Master the core principles of Segment Section: Midpoint Formula.

objectives.text: Move the points so the distance between them is exactly 5 units.

theory: The midpoint formula averages the x and y coordinates: M = ((x1+x2)/2, (y1+y2)/2). The midpoint bisects the segment into two equal lengths.

tasks.instruction: Move the points so the distance between them is exactly 5 units.

observationPrompts: How did coordinates react during drag movements?
